full_text:
EyeMT project

overview-experiments-data-next steps

Iga Niemiec 13.03.2025

Overview

Aims

Exploration of spatial and transcriptomics profiles of closely interacting immune cells within HGSC tumor microenvironment (TME)
Discovery of spatially-restricted immune escape mechanisms (IEMs)
identifying underlying mechanisms of IEMs 
discovery of new therapeutic targets

Samples

Batch 1 (08.2023 Inga-Maria’s project)
6 unpaired IDS 

Batch 2 (11.2024)
4 paired PDS + IDS (2 pairs)
9 unpaired IDS 

Batch 3 (02.2025, shared with TLS project)
10 paired PDS + IDS (5 pairs)
18 unpaired IDS

CD8-Tcells + Macrophages interactions

5 cell type interactions

HRP + HRD

Tumor Escape Mechanisms

Galassi et al. 2024; The hallmarks of cancer immune evasion

Speaker notes:
CAMOUFLAGE - avoid being localized by immune cells IMMUNE EXCLUSION - physical barrier

10 ROIs/sample
Batch 3: 15-25 ROIs/sample

ROI

+

HLA-I and HLA-II

Batch2 GeoMx data exploration

Quality Control - basic QC

13 samples
130 ROIs
210 AOIs

4 paired PDS+IDS (HRD + HRP)
9 unpaired IDS (HRP)

Quality Control - basic QC

excellent sequencing quality

good overall distribution of negative probes counts

Quality Control - gene detection rate

13 + 28 AOIs with GTR < 10% (usual threshold 5-10%), no specific biases found

Quality Control

spots mainly cluster by sample (patient-effect is also visible)

most stromal segments cluster together, but there are exceptions!

tSNE by ROI type

tSNE by sample

Nr of labels in the dataset

without NK label

with NK label

for the rest coverage is sufficient

12/24 labels have less than 5 repetitions

no CD4_Iba1 combination!

Segment types across labels

most of the segment are within tsi 
4celltype + CD4_CD8_Iba1 + CD8_CD11_Iba1, CD8_CD11 are only labels with substantial amount of stromal ROIs
CD8_Iba1 is the only label with mostly tumor ROIs

Labels distribution across samples - wo NK

high diversity of immune cell interactions across samples

Labels distribution across samples - with NK

GeoMx data processing pipeline overwiev

BulksignalR + CellChat + NicheNet

Next steps 1 - analysis to perform

Images overlay and TRIBUS cell type calling (including GeoMx ROIs)
Recurrent Cellular Neighbourhood analysis
Spatial cell distribution patterns (ecology field)
Niches calculation - to use for node creation

Ligand-Receptor analysis
Gene Regulatory Networks analysis

Aims

Exploration of spatial and transcriptomics profiles of closely interacting immune cells within HGSC tumor microenvironment (TME)
Discovery of spatially-restricted immune escape mechanisms (IEMs)
identifying underlying mechanisms of IEMs 
discovery of new therapeutic targets

Aims

Exploration of spatial and transcriptomics profiles of closely interacting immune cells within HGSC tumor microenvironment (TME)
Discovery of spatially-restricted immune escape mechanisms (IEMs)
identifying underlying mechanisms of IEMs 
discovery of new therapeutic targets

Next steps 3 - data integration

Creation of nodes within tCyCIF images (representing niches/hotspots of interacting immune cell types)
Graph Neural Network modelling using nodes (fraction of nodes = ROIs)
Validation on big PDS and IDS t-CycIF cohorts (Space + TLS projects)

Statistical modelling from Ecology field with transcriptomics + t-CycIF information:
GLMM/GAMM
linear/non-linear regression models with spatial components

Aleksandra Shabanova - experiment planning, t-CycIF data analysis, data integration

Gayani Anandagoda - GeoMx ligand-receptor interactions analysis

Thank you!
